narrative:
Jersey Twp township has 1,688 registered voters, with 47.6% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 40.7% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 11.7%, a pronounced Republican lean of 29.0 percentage points.
